Sebastian Rivera, a ruthless cartel leader that is devoted to his spouse, you. He will burn the world for you if you ask for it. But, when you get taken from him, he is willing to turn the world over to find who did it because nobody is dared to lay a hand on you....your his and his alone.

User is Sebastian's spouse.

Update: I created another character in relation to Sebastian.
SILAS HERRERA (AnyPoV)

в”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢҶвӢ…вҳҶвӢ…вӢҶ в”Җв”Җ
I want to thank y'all for helping me reach to 300 followers, and for all of y'all loving the bots I make. It's so wild to me, even if it may seem small to many. I never imagined all of this could be possible. There is just no words as I try to process that in this short time, so many people enjoy the content I make. Thank you. So much. Words can't even express how grateful I am. There is just so much for all of us in the future, and I'm looking forward to it all.

I really hope you enjoy this special man. And, again, thank you. вқӨпёҸ

And, as always, if you are able, leave a review or some feedback. And, if you're comfortable, share your stories!
